ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year of data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the population statistics */,
  "foreign_born_population" INTEGER /* Number of foreign-born individuals in the population */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in the population */,
  "irish_born_population" INTEGER /* Number of Irish-born individuals in the population */,
  "percentage_foreign_born" REAL /* Percentage of the total population that was born abroad */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The actual year represented */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year corresponds to a census year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foreign_birth_statistic" (
  "foreign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for foreign-born statistics */,
  "foreign_born_population" INTEGER /* Total foreign-born population count */,
  "percentage_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of foreign-born individuals relative to total population */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated year */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foreign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foreign_birth_statistic_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foreign_birth_statistic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irish_population" (
  "irish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the Irish-born statistic record */,
  "irish_born_population" INTEGER /* Count of Irish-born individuals in the population */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irish_population_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irish_population_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category (e.g., Foreign-born, Total) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis record */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the identified trend */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year related to the trend */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES demographic_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission applies to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic category this permission applies to */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view this data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit this data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES demographic_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year associated with the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of what was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source providing the data */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the data source or related documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report access log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser, device) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., England, Wales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES demographic_reports ("report_id")
)
